aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.paragraph1: N&B Interior is a brand born from the merger of two independent construction and renovation companies — one operating for over a decade, the other for three years. Our paths came together naturally through shared projects, trust and a similar view on service quality. Each of us brings many years of experience, a practical approach and a proven way of working.
aboutUs.paragraph2: We didn't look for a grand idea — we simply do well what we do best: help people create interiors where they want to live.
aboutUs.paragraph3: We specialize in comprehensive renovations and finishes for kitchens, bathrooms and rooms. We work on clear principles: we establish a transparent plan, advise on materials matched to expectations and budget, and carry out each stage with attention to detail.
aboutUs.paragraph4: We focus on full care and calm communication. We don't ask unnecessary questions — we are here to solve, not to complicate. No stress, no unnecessary paperwork. With us you know what is happening and when.
aboutUs.paragraph5: We carry out projects mainly in Tczew and its surroundings — both in smaller towns and larger cities such as Gdańsk, Pruszcz Gdański, Starogard Gdański and Pszczółki. If you live nearby, we have most likely already worked not far from you.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies
cookieConsent.message: We use cookies required for site functionality and (optionally) analytics. To use the contact form please accept cookies.
cookieConsent.mustAccept: To open the contact form you must accept cookies.

home.designZoneDescription: Design Zone is the option to order an interior design or custom-made furniture in one place — without discrepancies between vision and execution. Design and implementation under one roof save time and provide peace of mind. In the Design Zone you can order an interior or custom furniture design as an additional paid service, and we will handle coordination from the first sketch to installation. Currently the Design Zone is in the launch phase — we are working on it continuously and ask for your understanding.
home.promoDescription: We create spaces that delight — with passion, precision, and timeless style!
home.pricingDescription: Every interior has its own rhythm and every project has its own constraints. That’s why we don’t use fixed price lists; we prepare quotes tailored to the specifics of your apartment and the desired standard. For the online option we will prepare an estimate based on the floor plan, photos and a short description of your needs so you quickly get a reliable reference point. If you prefer an on-site visit, we will perform an inspection and precise measurements, then present a detailed estimate and a recommended schedule. We transparently explain what makes up the price – so your decision is calm and informed.
home.stage1Description: We will carefully listen to your expectations, clarify details, and prepare a preliminary plan.
home.stage2Description: We formalize arrangements in a clear contract that specifies the scope of work, payment terms, and rules for making changes.
home.stage3Description: We help select materials that fit the style and budget; upon request we handle ordering and logistics.
home.stage4Description: We carry out the work in stages according to the plan and standards, ensuring cleanliness and safety.
home.stage5Description: Together we check conformity with the project. After acceptance we provide warranties and the final settlement.
home.kitchenFeature4: Optimized space planning and storage solutions
home.stoneFeature1: Selection and preparation of natural stone (marble, granite, quartzite)
home.stoneFeature2: Professional wall cladding, facades, and fireplace surrounds
home.stoneFeature3: Installation of stone countertops, windowsills, and staircases
home.stoneFeature4: Protective treatment, sealing, and surface polishing

categories.kitchenDescription: Modern and functional kitchen designs for every taste.
categories.bathroomDescription: Luxurious and relaxing bathroom spaces tailored to your needs.
categories.roomsDescription: Comfortable and stylish living spaces designed for ultimate comfort.
categories.naturalStoneDescription: Exquisite and durable surface finishing with natural stone for a unique style.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.description: Explore our completed renovation projects and see how we transform spaces.

kitchen.promoDescription: Transform your kitchen into a functional and beautiful space. We create kitchens that inspire.
kitchen.detailedDescription: Our comprehensive kitchen renovation services cover everything from bespoke cabinet installations to modern appliance integration and ergonomic layout design. We focus on creating a space that is not only visually stunning but also highly functional for your culinary needs. Our team ensures a smooth process from concept to completion, delivering a kitchen that truly reflects your style and enhances your home's value.

bathroom.promoDescription: From sleek designs to spa-like retreats, we craft bathrooms that combine comfort and style.
bathroom.detailedDescription: Experience a complete transformation of your bathroom into a luxurious and comfortable oasis. Our services include custom shower enclosures, modern vanity installations, elegant tiling, and efficient plumbing solutions. We pay attention to every detail, ensuring high-quality finishes and durable materials that stand the test of time, providing you with a personal sanctuary for relaxation.

naturalStone.promoTitle: Natural Beauty and Eternal Durability of Stone
naturalStone.promoDescription: Add prestige and luxury to your space with the unique textures of natural materials.
naturalStone.detailedDescription: We offer a full range of services for working with natural stone: from assistance in selecting the finest marble or granite slabs to meticulous installation. Our craftsmen create accent walls, fireplace surrounds, and durable countertops that become the centerpiece of any interior. We use modern fastening methods and specialized protective treatments to ensure the stone's resistance to moisture and stains, preserving its original appearance for decades.

rooms.promoDescription: Revitalize your living room, bedroom, or any other space with our expert renovation services.
rooms.detailedDescription: Whether it's a cozy bedroom, a vibrant living room, or a functional home office, our room renovation services are tailored to your specific desires. We handle everything from wall treatments, flooring, lighting, to custom built-ins, creating spaces that are both aesthetically pleasing and perfectly suited to your lifestyle. Let us help you reimagine and refresh your interiors.

interiorFinishes.promoDescription: Complete finishing works — from surface preparation and painting to trims and lighting installations.
interiorFinishes.detailedDescription: We provide a full range of finishing services: substrate preparation, painting, flooring and trim installation, lighting and fixture installation, and carpentry. We prioritize durable materials and precise workmanship to make interiors both beautiful and highly functional.

renovations.promoDescription: Complete apartment and house renovations, structural upgrades and system modernizations.
renovations.detailedDescription: We handle structural works, MEP system replacement, layout reconfiguration, demolition and rebuilding, plus finishing trades. We coordinate subcontractors, provide technical supervision, and deliver projects on schedule with clear communication throughout.

terraces.promoDescription: Design and build terraces and balconies resistant to weather and wear.
terraces.detailedDescription: We perform drainage and waterproofing, install decking or tiling, fit railings and balustrades, and build durable structures in wood, composite or concrete. Solutions focus on longevity, safety and aesthetic appeal.

fences.promoTitle: Fences & Gates for Security and Style
fences.promoDescription: Installation of fences, gates and access doors in a variety of materials and styles.
fences.detailedDescription: We offer metal, wooden and mesh fences, gate and wicket installation, anti-corrosion coatings and post-installation service. Work includes precise foundations, hardware fitting and finishing for lasting protection and curb appeal.
